title: Server Shop
description: DynamicEconomy AI is a high-performance 1.21+ marketplace featuring a living supply-and-demand economy with real-time price fluctuations. This overhaul includes an immersive dark-themed UI, a real-time Bulk Sell Station, dedicated bulk-purchase
body:
🛒 Server Shop (Dynamic Economy AI v2.3)
Stop using static, boring prices. DynamicEconomy AI transforms your Minecraft marketplace into a living, breathing financial ecosystem where prices react to player actions in real-time! 🚀

When players flood the market with diamonds, the price drops. When wood is scarce, the value skyrockets. Experience a real supply-and-demand engine with a professional Gold & Orange branded UI.

✨ Key Features
📈 Live AI Market Engine: Prices now calculate using a professional volatility formula. Every buy pushes the price up, and every sell pulls it down—instantly.

📊 Market Trends (/market): A brand new "Trending" GUI that shows players which items are in High Demand (Price Up) or in a Market Surplus (Price Down).

🕒 Hourly Price Stabilization: The market "heals" itself! Every hour, the Market Heartbeat slowly returns stock levels to zero, ensuring prices stabilize back to their base value over time.

🛡️ Anti-Crash Safety Floor: Never worry about free items. We've implemented a hard coded $0.10 price floor and a "Spread Guard" to prevent infinite money glitches.

💸 5x5 Industrial Sell Station: Type /sell to open a massive 5x5 grid. Drop your loot in (including Shulkers!) and watch the Live Grid Valuation update in real-time.

⚡ Enterprise Sell Wands: Purchase Normal, Epic, or Legendary wands with custom multipliers to clear out chests and shulkers in seconds.

📦 Deep Shulker Scanning: Version 2.3 now "Deep Scans" shulker boxes in the sell grid, selling the contents at market value and returning the empty box to the player.

🎨 Modern Orange UI Overhaul: A beautiful high-contrast Gold/Orange theme featuring Small-Caps typography and smart HEX color support.

🎮 Commands
Player Commands
/shop — Opens the main marketplace.

/market — [NEW] View live price trends, stock levels, and "Hot" items.

/sell — Opens the 5x5 Industrial Bulk Sell Station.

/sellwand — Purchase multiplier wands.

/balance — Check your current wallet.

/sellall — Instantly sell your entire inventory at current market rates.

Admin Commands (dynamiceco.admin)
/shopadmin category create <id> <name> <icon> <slot> — Create a new category.

/shopadmin edititem <category> <item> <buy> <sell> — [UPDATED] Instantly change base prices and safety boundaries.

/selladmin info <item> — View raw AI data (Volatility, Stock, and Decay rates).

/selladmin reset <item> — Instantly wipe an item's trade history and reset its price.

/shopadmin reload — Apply config changes and heartbeat settings instantly.

🛠️ In-Game Setup Example
Create Category: /shopadmin category create minerals &#ffaa00ᴍɪɴᴇʀᴀʟꜱ DIAMOND 13

Add Item: /shopadmin category additem minerals DIAMOND 1000.0 350.0 10

Check Trends: /market to see how the price moves after a sale!

🧱 Requirements (Mandatory!)
To make the magic happen, your server must have:

Paper, Purpur, or Spigot (1.21+)

Vault (Mandatory for economy communication)

EssentialsX (Or any Vault-compatible economy provider)

CREATED BY:
UNDER_SC0RE_ & Random_boss
